_provenance: schema-derived from exit_triggers DDL. Timestamps are fixed wall-clock values chosen to test 3-minute window boundary exactly. ET timestamps follow exit_triggers.ts_et format '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S'. Window = 3 minutes = 180 seconds.
note: 3 of 4 = 75% > 50% — alert trips if all three timestamps fall inside window; does not trip if oldest is at or beyond 3 min boundary

cases.label: oldest_at_exactly_boundary_excluded
cases.note: Oldest at exactly now-3:00 = 10:30:00 — outside window (boundary is exclusive on left: window is (now - window_minutes, now])
cases.note_on_boundary: ts_et exactly at now - window_minutes is outside the window. Only 2 of 4 symphonies = 50% — strict > means no trip.
